member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Saves.RunHistoryMissingModelSupport
member.summary: Run history UI calls for acts/characters. When a mod is unloaded, those ids are missing and vanilla throws; we fall back so the screen can render like deprecated event/encounter handling. 跑局历史 UI 会为章节/角色调用 。当 mod 被卸载时，这些 id 会缺失且原版会抛出；我们提供 fallback，使界面能像处理已弃用事件/遭遇一样渲染。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Saves.RunResumeMissingCharacterSupport
member.summary: Shared checks when resuming a run: missing means a mod was unloaded. We never delete run saves so the player can restore mods and continue later. 恢复跑局时的共享检查：缺失 表示某个 mod 已卸载。 我们从不删除跑局存档，因此玩家可以稍后恢复 mod 并继续。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Cards.HandGlow.ModCardHandGlowRules
member.summary: Declarative hand-highlight rules that mirror vanilla (gold border when a bonus / stronger line is active while the card is playable) and (red border for warning states such as companion missing). Applied either by overriding the protected ShouldGlow*Internal members, or by registering with / (see RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard> on the content registry). / 声明式手牌高亮规则，镜像原版 （卡牌可打出且 奖励/更强效果行生效时显示金色边框）和 （用于伙伴缺失等警告状态的红色边框）。 可通过 override 受保护的 ShouldGlow*Internal 成员应用，也可通过 / 注册（见内容注册表上的 RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard>）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Cards.HandOutline.ModCardHandOutlineRule
member.summary: Custom hand-card outline tint (drives Modulate after vanilla playable / gold / red). Register with or ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>(). 自定义手牌卡牌描边色调（在原版可打出/金色/红色之后驱动 Modulate）。通过 或 ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>() 注册。
member.param: When this returns true for the card instance, the outline color may apply. 对卡牌实例返回 true 时，描边颜色可生效。
Godot modulate color (alpha is respected; vanilla highlights use ~0.98). Godot modulate 颜色（alpha 会被尊重；原版高亮约为 0.98）。
When several rules match, the highest wins; ties favor the most recently registered rule. 多条规则匹配时，最高 获胜；平手时优先最近注册的 规则。

If true, the highlight is forced visible with this color even when the card is not playable and vanilla would not show gold/red (still only while combat is in progress). 如果为 true，即使卡牌不可打出且原版不会 显示金色/红色，也会强制以此颜色显示高亮（仍仅在战斗进行中）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Characters.Patches.CardLibraryCompendiumPatch
member.summary:
Adds a pool-filter button for each registered mod character in the card library compendium (skips characters with ), and re-applies pool-filter art from (so
cref="ModContentRegistry.RegisterCharacterAssetReplacement(string, Scaffolding.Characters.CharacterAssetProfile)" /> icons match everywhere). Icons match everywhere). Without this patch, mod character cards are not visible in any filter category, and opening the card library during a run with a mod character causes a KeyNotFoundException crash. Mod-character rows use unless overridden via (or the template virtual). Optional shared-pool filters use end-of-strip placement when no rules are supplied. All rows share one placement pass (vanilla anchor priority list, mod-to-mod constraint relaxation, unified sort, then insertion). 为卡牌库 compendium 中每个已注册 mod 角色添加牌池过滤按钮（跳过 带 的角色），并 从 重新应用牌池过滤美术（因此
图标在各处保持一致）。 图标在各处保持一致）。 没有此 patch 时，mod 角色卡牌不会在任何过滤类别中可见，并且在使用 mod 角色的跑局中打开 卡牌库会导致 KeyNotFoundException 崩溃。 mod 角色行使用 ，除非 通过 （或模板 virtual）覆盖。没有提供规则时，可选 共享池过滤器使用条带末尾放置。所有行共享一次放置流程 （原版锚点优先级列表、mod 到 mod 约束放宽、统一排序，然后插入）。

Clones vanilla pool-filter UI for each mod character and wires pool predicates so compendium filtering works without KeyNotFoundException. 为每个 mod 角色克隆原版牌池过滤 UI，并接线牌池谓词，使 compendium 过滤 无需 KeyNotFoundException 即可工作。

A pool-filter control to clone the Image from, and the fallback icon source for shared compendium rows. When the base game has already created mod character filters, the leftmost of those in the pool strip; otherwise the first present vanilla (strip order) from . 用于克隆 Image 的牌池过滤控件，以及共享 compendium 行的 fallback 图标 来源。当基础游戏已经创建 mod 角色过滤器时，使用 牌池条带中这些过滤器最左侧的一个；否则使用 中第一个存在的原版 （条带顺序）。

Physical reuses the same to seed the working sibling list. 在 的坐标空间中解析逻辑插入索引，应用 mod 到 mod 约束，为共享行分类“追加到条带末尾”，然后对 mod 行进行 稳定排序 （append-end 最后，否则按 ，再按注册顺序）。 物理 复用同一个 来初始化 工作 sibling 列表。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Characters.Patches.NCreatureNonSpineDeathAnimationTriggerPatch
member.summary: Fires the Dead animation trigger for RitsuLib-managed creatures without a Spine animator after runs. Vanilla gates the entire trigger dispatch (including death SFX) behind _spineAnimator != null, so mod creatures using AnimatedSprite2D, Godot AnimationPlayer, or cue-frame-sequence backends never receive the trigger — the most visible symptom for players is that the death animation does not play when the run is abandoned or the player dies in combat. 在 运行后，为没有 Spine animator 的 RitsuLib 管理生物触发 Dead 动画触发器。原版将整个触发器派发（包括死亡 SFX）门控在 _spineAnimator != null 之后，因此使用 AnimatedSprite2D、Godot AnimationPlayer 或 cue-frame-sequence 后端的 mod 生物永远收不到该触发器，最明显的玩家症状 是跑局被放弃或玩家在战斗中死亡时，死亡动画不会播放。

remarks.para: When all guards pass, the patch calls , which routes through the model's (when registered) or the legacy cue playback ().
This patch does not attempt to backfill the death-animation length returned from — vanilla already returns 0f for non-Spine creatures unless a monster sets .

Scope: postfix 仅在以下所有条件成立时触发，因此未选择加入 RitsuLib 视觉管线的外部生物不受影响：
该生物没有 Spine animator；
该生物的模型（Entity.Player?.Character 或 Entity.Monster） 通过实现 （或旧版 ），或者仅对玩家通过 （它会拉取 cue 播放路径），选择加入 RitsuLib 视觉。
当所有 guard 通过时，patch 调用 ； 会将其通过模型的 （已注册时） 或旧版 cue 播放
此 patch 不尝试回填从 返回的死亡动画长度；原版已对非 Spine 生物返回 0f， 除非某个怪物设置了 。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Characters.Patches.NCreatureNonSpineDeathAnimationTriggerPatch.Postfix(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.Combat.NCreature)
member.summary: Dispatches Dead through for RitsuLib-managed non-Spine creatures only; returns silently otherwise. 仅为 RitsuLib 管理的非 Spine 生物通过 派发 Dead；否则静默返回。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Characters.Patches.NCreatureNonSpineReviveAnimationTriggerPatch
member.summary: Fires the Revive animation trigger for RitsuLib-managed creatures after when vanilla would not dispatch it. Vanilla only dispatches the trigger when a Spine animator exists and reports Revive; otherwise it falls back to AnimTempRevive (a fade-out / fade-in tween on the visuals root), which silently swallows any Revive state the mod creature registered on a without a matching Revive branch on the vanilla . 在 后、原版不会派发时，为 RitsuLib 管理的生物触发 Revive 动画触发器。原版只会在存在 Spine animator 且 报告 Revive 时派发该触发器；否则会 fallback 到 AnimTempRevive（视觉 根节点上的淡出/淡入 tween），这会静默吞掉 mod 生物在 上注册但在原版 上没有匹配 Revive 分支的任何 Revive 状态。
member.remarks: Scope mirrors for non-Spine creatures. For Spine-backed creatures with a combat state machine that declares Revive, the postfix may dispatch Revive when the vanilla animator does not expose that trigger (see interface remarks on keeping both in sync). The vanilla fade tween still runs alongside the triggered animation when AnimTempRevive also ran; mods that want a clean revive animation should treat the brief fade as expected behaviour. 作用域与非 Spine 生物的 保持一致。对于 带有声明 Revive 的战斗状态机的 Spine 支持生物，当原版 animator 未暴露该触发器时，postfix 可能派发 Revive（关于保持两者同步，见接口备注）。当 AnimTempRevive 也运行时，原版淡化 tween 仍会与触发的动画并行运行；想要干净复活动画的 mod 应将这段短暂淡化视为预期行为。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Characters.Patches.NCreatureNonSpineReviveAnimationTriggerPatch.Postfix(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.Combat.NCreature)
member.summary: Dispatches Revive through when in scope; skips when vanilla already dispatched Revive on the Spine . 在作用域内时通过 派发 Revive；当 原版已在 Spine 上派发 Revive 时跳过。

member.summary: Shared gate used by combat animation lifecycle postfixes so scope stays consistent across / . 战斗动画生命周期 postfix 使用的共享 gate，使作用域在 / 之间保持一致。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.AncientEventPresentationAssetProfile
member.summary: Optional ancient map node and run-history icon paths (vanilla AncientEventModel presentation), plus optional procedural stage layers (background / foreground cues) for the ancient event backdrop. 可选远古事件地图节点和运行历史图标路径（原版 AncientEventModel 表现），以及用于远古事件背景的 可选程序化舞台图层（背景 / 前景 cue）。
member.param: Compressed texture for map node icon. 地图节点图标的压缩贴图。
Compressed texture for map node outline. 地图节点轮廓的压缩贴图。
Run history main icon texture. 运行历史主图标贴图。
Run history outline texture. 运行历史轮廓贴图。
When set, replaces the packed background scene in NAncientEventLayout with in-memory layered sprites and cue playback (see ). 设置后，用内存中的分层 sprite 和 cue 播放替换 NAncientEventLayout 中的 packed 背景场景 （见 ）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ContentAssetProfiles
member.summary: Factory methods that build base-game (res://) asset paths from vanilla folder and atlas entry names. They do not infer paths from mod model ids — mod-only art uses explicit profile fields or your PCK layout. Act borrowing mirrors (vanilla id in, vanilla paths out). 根据原版文件夹名和 atlas 条目名构建 基础游戏（res://）资源路径的工厂方法。 它们不会从 mod 模型 id 推断路径；mod 专属美术应使用显式 profile 字段或你的 PCK 布局。 借用章节美术的行为与 一致 （输入原版 id，输出原版路径）。

Pass the base-game directory name, not a mod Id.Entry. 为 原版章节文件夹名（例如 hive、 ship）构建完整的 ：主背景场景、scenes/backgrounds/<id>/layers、地图视差图片、 休息点和宝箱 Spine。请传入基础游戏目录名，而不是 mod 的 Id.Entry。

member.summary: Builds default encounter asset paths for (vanilla EncounterModel layout), including concrete run-history texture paths under ui/run_history/ (same files vanilla uses for that slug). 为 构建默认遭遇ResourcePath（原版 EncounterModel 布局），包括 ui/run_history/ 下的具体运行历史贴图路径（与原版该 slug 使用的文件相同）。
member.param: Vanilla encounter folder / animation slug (normalized to lowercase). 原版遭遇文件夹 / 动画 slug（会规范化为小写）。
When non-null, overrides the main run-history icon path; otherwise ($\"ui/run_history/{normalized}.png\"). 非 null 时覆盖运行历史主图标路径；否则使用
When non-null, overrides the outline path; otherwise ($\"ui/run_history/{normalized}_outline.png\"). 非 null 时覆盖轮廓路径；否则使用

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModActTemplate
member.summary: Base for mods: chest Spine path override, scene/map paths, and optional custom combat background layers directory (_bg_ / _fg_ scenes). To reuse a vanilla act’s shipped art, set from (vanilla folder name, not this act’s model id). Mod 章节的基础 ：提供宝箱 Spine 路径覆盖、 场景/地图路径，以及可选的自定义战斗背景图层目录（_bg_ / _fg_ 场景）。 若要复用原版章节随游戏发布的美术，请从 设置 （使用原版文件夹名，而不是此章节的模型 id）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModAfflictionTemplate
member.summary: Base for mods: keyword hover tips and overlay path. Mod 苦痛的基础 ：提供关键词悬浮提示和 覆盖层路径。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModAfflictionTemplate.RegisteredKeywordIds
member.summary: Keyword ids surfaced on this affliction's hover tips. Display-only: unlike , this does not participate in any gameplay keyword set (vanilla has no Keywords/ CardKeyword storage) — each id is looked up in purely to render a hover tip via ToHoverTips(). Use it for visual documentation; gameplay behaviour must be implemented explicitly in the affliction's own logic. 要显示在此苦痛悬停提示上的关键词 id。仅用于显示：不同于 ，它不会参与任何游戏逻辑关键词集合（原版 没有 Keywords/CardKeyword 存储）- 每个 id 只会通过 查找，用来通过 ToHoverTips() 渲染悬停提示。请将它用于视觉说明；游戏行为必须在苦痛自身逻辑中显式实现。

member.summary: Additional hover tips merged after keyword expansion. 合并在关键词展开之后的额外悬浮提示。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModCardTemplate
member.summary: Base for mods: hooks extra hover tips (keywords) and optional asset overrides via . For gold/red hand highlights (Evil Eye / Osty-style), override ShouldGlowGoldInternal / ShouldGlowRedInternal or use / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard>() with . For arbitrary hand-highlight colors use / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>(). / Mod 卡牌的基础 ：接入额外悬停提示（关键词），并通过 提供可选资源覆盖。对于金色/红色手牌高亮（Evil Eye / Osty 风格），请重写 ShouldGlowGoldInternal / ShouldGlowRedInternal，或结合 / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard>() 使用 。对于任意手牌高亮颜色，请使用 / / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>()。

member.summary: Base for mods: hooks extra hover tips (keywords) and optional asset overrides via . For gold/red hand highlights (Evil Eye / Osty-style), override ShouldGlowGoldInternal / ShouldGlowRedInternal or use / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard>() with . For arbitrary hand-highlight colors use / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>(). / Mod 卡牌的基础 ：接入额外悬停提示（关键词），并通过 提供可选资源覆盖。对于金色/红色手牌高亮（Evil Eye / Osty 风格），请重写 ShouldGlowGoldInternal / ShouldGlowRedInternal，或结合 / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandGlow<TCard>() 使用 。对于任意手牌高亮颜色，请使用 / / ModContentRegistry.RegisterCardHandOutline<TCard>()。

member.summary: Legacy constructor overload; is ignored. 旧版构造函数重载； 会被忽略。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModCardTemplate.RegisteredKeywordIds
member.summary: Keyword declarations seeded onto every instance of this card on first access. Intentionally kept as a separate channel from vanilla so derived mods can still override CanonicalKeywords for vanilla keywords without accidentally dropping their mod keyword declarations. Each string resolves as a registered mod keyword id first, then as a vanilla enum name, and is unioned into CardModel.Keywords right after the vanilla canonical seed runs, so runtime additions/removals and DeepCloneFields preserve them. 首次访问 时种入每个卡牌实例的关键词声明。它刻意与原版 分离，这样派生 mod 仍可重写 CanonicalKeywords 来声明原版关键词，而不会意外丢失自己的 mod 关键词 声明。每个字符串会先按已注册的 mod 关键词 id 解析，再按原版 枚举名解析，并在原版规范种入执行后合并进 CardModel.Keywords，因此运行时增删和 DeepCloneFields 都会保留它们。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModCardTemplate.RegisteredCardTagIds
member.summary: Card tag declarations seeded onto every instance when is first materialized. Each string resolves as a registered mod card-tag id first, then as a vanilla enum name, and is unioned into the same backing set as . 首次实体化 时种入每个卡牌实例的卡牌标签声明。每个字符串会先按已注册的 mod 卡牌标签 id 解析，再按原版 枚举名解析，并合并到与 相同的后备集合。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModCardTemplate.AdditionalHoverTips
member.summary: Extra hover tips appended after keyword-derived tips. 在关键词派生提示之后追加的额外悬浮提示。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModCardTemplate.EnumerateRegisteredCardTagIds
member.summary: Internal accessor for the mod card-tag seeding patch. 供 mod 卡牌标签种入补丁使用的内部访问器。

member.summary: Same as the 5-parameter primary constructor. The argument is accepted so call sites can mirror / / … style: pass ModCardTagRegistry.For() or . The value is not read; is always the per-mod singleton from ModCardTagRegistry.For. / 与 5 参数 主构造函数相同。接受 参数是为了让调用点可以镜像 / / ... 风格：传入 ModCardTagRegistry.For() 或 。该值不会被读取； 始终是来自 ModCardTagRegistry.For 的每 mod singleton。 /

Same as the 6-parameter compatibility constructor, accepting a card-pile registry so call sites can mirror style alongside content / keywords / card tags. The value is not read; is always the per-mod singleton. 与 6 参数兼容构造函数相同，接受牌堆注册表，使调用点可以在 content / keywords / card tags 旁边 镜像 风格。该值不会被读取； 始终是每 mod 单例。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModEncounterTemplate
member.summary:
Base for mods: (combat scene path, backgrounds, boss node, map-node preload, extra paths), optional . The background pipeline matches vanilla EncounterModel.HasCustomBackground semantics, with an explicit switch to keep using the act’s combat background when desired. For disk-free backgrounds, set and implement using (or reuse ).
Registration: act-only — ModContentRegistry.RegisterActEncounter<TAct, TEncounter>() or ModContentPackBuilder.ActEncounter<TAct, TEncounter>(); all acts — RegisterGlobalEncounter<TEncounter>() or GlobalEncounter<TEncounter>(). Register each used in this encounter with RegisterMonster<T>() / Monster<T>() so ModelDb.Monsters lists them. ）。
Mod 遭遇的基础 ：（战斗场景路径、背景、Boss 节点、地图节点预加载、额外路径），以及可选 。背景管线匹配原版 EncounterModel.HasCustomBackground 语义，并提供显式开关，以便需要时继续使用章节的战斗背景。对于无磁盘背景，请设置 ，并使用 实现 （或复用 ）。
注册：仅某个章节 - ModContentRegistry.RegisterActEncounter<TAct, TEncounter>() 或 ModContentPackBuilder.ActEncounter<TAct, TEncounter>()；所有章节 - RegisterGlobalEncounter<TEncounter>() 或 GlobalEncounter<TEncounter>()。请使用 RegisterMonster<T>() / Monster<T>() 注册此遭遇使用的每个 ，使 ModelDb.Monsters 能列出它们。 ）。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModEncounterTemplate.UseActCombatBackground
member.summary: When true (default), combat background comes from the parent act’s ; profile paths from are ignored for background selection (they still preload encounter scenes / map art where applicable). When false, use encounter-specific layers / main scene from , like vanilla HasCustomBackground. 为 true（默认）时，战斗背景来自父级章节的 ；来自 的 profile 路径不会参与背景选择（这些路径 仍会在适用时预加载遭遇场景 / 地图美术）。为 false 时，像原版 HasCustomBackground 一样使用遭遇专属图层 / 主 场景，来源为 。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.ModEncounterTemplate.UseProgrammaticCombatBackground
member.summary: When true, supplies combat instead of loading res://scenes/backgrounds/<encounter-id>/…. Ignored when or resolves to a valid path (path-based custom background wins). 为 true 时，由 提供战斗 ，而不是加载 res://scenes/backgrounds/<encounter-id>/…。 如果 或 能解析到有效路径，则忽略此项 （基于路径的自定义背景优先）。

To reuse the act background, return parentAct.GenerateBackgroundAssets(rng). parentAct.GenerateBackgroundAssets(rng)。 当 为 true 时构建战斗背景资源。返回 null 会回退到原版磁盘布局（若目录缺失可能抛出异常）。若要复用章节背景，请返回 parentAct.GenerateBackgroundAssets(rng)。 parentAct.GenerateBackgroundAssets(rng)。

member.summary: Runtime Spine factory for any combat creature model (player characters and monsters). Overrides the default vanilla GenerateAnimator so mods can wire custom graphs (idle / hit / attack / cast / die / relaxed) without subclassing NCreature. Prefer for the standard shape; return to fall through to vanilla behaviour. ； 任意战斗生物模型（玩家角色和怪物）的运行时 Spine 工厂。它会覆盖默认原版 GenerateAnimator，让 mod 可以接入自定义 图（idle / hit / attack / cast / die / relaxed），而无需继承 NCreature。标准结构优先使用 ；返回 则回退到原版行为。 。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.IModCreatureCombatAnimationStateMachineFactory
member.summary: Runtime combat factory for any creature model (player characters, monsters, or other ) whose flow should be routed through instead of (or in addition to) the vanilla path. Works for non-Spine backends (cue frames, Godot , , composite) and for Spine when the machine is built over (for example ). ）。 任意生物模型（玩家角色、怪物或其它 ）的运行时战斗 工厂；当其 流程应路由到 ，而不是（或同时）走原版 路径时使用。适用于非 Spine 后端（cue 帧、Godot 、、组合），也适用于构建在 之上的 Spine 状态机（例如 。

remarks.para:
Typical implementers subclass
or , but the templates are convenience. The contract is opt-in via the interface itself: any model type implementing this interface is routed through — template subclassing is not required.
receives the same trigger names that vanilla would dispatch to a Spine animator (Idle, Attack, Cast, Hit, Dead, Revive, …). （Idle、Attack、Cast、Hit、Dead、Revive、…）。

When this factory returns non-null for a Spine-backed creature, the routing patch consumes before the vanilla _spineAnimator path runs; keep in sync for Revive if you rely on vanilla gating, or rely on the RitsuLib revive postfix when the animator does not declare Revive.
常见实现会继承 或 ，但模板只是便利封装。契约本身通过接口 opt-in：任何实现此接口的模型类型都会通过 路由 - 不要求继承模板。
接收与原版会分派给 Spine animator 的相同 trigger 名称（Idle、Attack 、Cast、Hit、Dead、Revive、…）。
当此工厂为 Spine 支持的生物返回非 null 时，路由补丁会在原版 _spineAnimator 路径运行前消耗 ；如果你依赖原版 gating，请保持 中的 Revive 同步，或者在 animator 未声明 Revive 时依赖 RitsuLib revive postfix。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.IModCreatureCombatAnimationStateMachineFactory.TryCreateCombatAnimationStateMachine(Godot.Node)
member.summary: Builds a state machine bound to , or to defer to vanilla Spine triggers or, when there is no Spine animator, to the single-shot cue playback path. Called at most once per combat visuals lifetime (cached by the routing patch via a keyed on ). 构建绑定到 的状态机；返回 则回退到原版 Spine trigger，若没有 Spine animator，则回退到 单次 cue 播放路径。每个战斗视觉生命周期最多调用一次（路由补丁会通过以 为键的 缓存）。
member.param: Combat visuals root (typically an ). 战斗视觉根节点（通常是 ）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.IModTextEnergyIconPool
member.summary:
Implement on a subclass to supply a custom image path for the small energy icon rendered inside rich-text card descriptions (e.g. [img]…/winefox_energy_icon.png[/img]).
The default game path pattern is: res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/{EnergyColorName}_energy_icon.png. Use this interface only when you need a different path. 在 子类上实现此接口，以提供自定义图像路径，用于 富文本卡牌描述中渲染的小型能量图标 （例如 [img]…/winefox_energy_icon.png[/img]）。
游戏默认路径模式为： 仅在需要不同路径时使用此接口。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.EnergyIconFormatterPatch
member.summary:
Intercepts EnergyIconsFormatter.TryEvaluateFormat after it assembles the hard-coded rich-text img tag for the small energy icon used in card descriptions, and replaces it with a custom path when the owning card pool implements .
The default game path pattern is: [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/{prefix}_energy_icon.png[/img]. Implementing on the lets you use any resource path. 拦截 EnergyIconsFormatter.TryEvaluateFormat：在它组装用于卡牌描述中小型能量图标的 硬编码富文本 img 标签后， 如果所属卡牌池实现 ，则替换为自定义路径。
游戏默认路径模式为： 在 上实现 后即可使用任意资源路径。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.EnergyIconFormatterPatch.Transpiler(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction})
member.summary:
After the formatter stores the assembled text3 img-tag into its local variable, insert a call that lets redirect to a custom path. Matched IL pattern (inside TryEvaluateFormat):
ldstr "[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/" ldloc (text / prefix) ldstr "_energy_icon.png[/img]" call string.Concat(string, string, string) stloc (text3) ← match ends here
Inserted after stloc:
ldloc (text) ldloc (text3) call ModTextEnergyIconHelper.OverrideTextIconTag call ModTextEnergyIconHelper.OverrideTextIconTag stloc (text3)
格式化器将组装好的 text3 img 标签存入局部变量后， 插入一次调用，让 重定向到自定义路径。 匹配的 IL 模式（位于 TryEvaluateFormat 内）：
ldloc (text / prefix)
在 stloc 后插入：
ldloc (text) ldloc (text3) call ModTextEnergyIconHelper.OverrideTextIconTag call ModTextEnergyIconHelper.OverrideTextIconTag stloc (text3)

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ModTextEnergyIconHelper
member.summary: Runtime helper called by the patched formatter. On first use it builds a lookup table from all registered mod characters' card pools that implement . that implement IModTextEnergyIconPool. 由已修补格式化器调用的运行时辅助方法。 首次使用时，它会从所有已注册 mod 角色中实现 的卡牌池 构建查找表。 实现 IModTextEnergyIconPool 的卡牌池。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ImageHelperAncientModRunHistoryIconPathPatch
member.summary:
Vanilla run-history rows call /
directly, bypassing . This prefix returns mod paths at resolve time so the first load uses the correct textures (no post-load replacement on NMapPointHistoryEntry). 原版跑局历史行会直接调用 / ， 绕过 。此前缀在解析时返回 mod 路径，使首次加载就使用正确纹理 （无需在 NMapPointHistoryEntry 上进行加载后替换）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ImageHelperAncientModRunHistoryIconPathPatch.Prefix(System.Reflection.MethodBase,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Map.MapPointType,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Rooms.RoomType,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.ModelId,System.String@)
member.summary: Supplies mod run-history texture paths before vanilla builds ui/run_history/<entry>.png paths. 在原版构建 ui/run_history/<entry>.png 路径之前，提供 mod 跑局历史纹理路径。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ImageHelperModEncounterRunHistoryIconPathPatch
member.summary:
Run history and top bar call with a that may be an encounter, ancient, event, etc. Only when the id resolves to an with mod overrides do we remap paths (otherwise vanilla resolution runs). Mod encounters without this would hit missing ui/run_history/<mod_entry>.png. This prefix returns /
when those paths exist (same pattern as for ancients). 跑局历史和顶部栏会使用一个 调用 ，该 id 可能是 一个 遭遇、远古事件、事件等。只有当 id 解析为带有 mod 覆盖的 时， 我们 才会重映射路径（否则走原版解析）。没有此前缀的 mod 遭遇会命中缺失的 ui/run_history/<mod_entry>.png。此前缀会返回 /
中存在的路径（模式与远古事件的 相同）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ImageHelperModEncounterRunHistoryIconPathPatch.Prefix(System.Reflection.MethodBase,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Map.MapPointType,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Rooms.RoomType,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.ModelId,System.String@)
member.summary: Harmony prefix: return the configured res://images/… path when present on disk / in the resource loader. Harmony 前缀：当配置的 res://images/… 路径存在于磁盘 / 资源加载器中时返回该路径。

member.summary: Merge order (lowest → highest): character rows, programmatic registry, then / global replacement. 合并顺序（最低 → 最高）：角色 行、 编程式注册表，然后是 / 全局替换。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.Patches.ModModelRuntimeGodotFactoryPatches
member.summary: Harmony patches that call mod runtime Godot factory interfaces from vanilla model entry points. Prefixes use Harmony Priority.First so path-based overrides still run when factories return null. 从原版模型入口点调用 mod 运行时 Godot 工厂接口的 Harmony 补丁。前缀使用 Harmony Priority.First 因此当工厂返回 null 时，基于路径的覆盖仍会运行。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.TimelineColumnBuilder`1.Epoch``1(System.Action{STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.EpochSlotBuilder{``0}})
member.summary: Registers on the story column, then optional slot configuration (pool defaults, gated lists, etc.). For epochs, timeline layout must be registered before freeze; when using this builder, the typical approach is to call or inside (or register elsewhere before freeze, e.g. ModContentPackBuilder ModEpoch* helpers), so apply-time validation can run (conflicts with vanilla throw at apply time). Execution order matches call order; later RequireEpoch for the same model overrides earlier ones. 在故事列上注册 ，然后执行可选槽位配置（池默认值、 门控列表等）。对于 纪元，必须在冻结前注册时间线布局； 使用此构建器时，典型做法是在 内调用 或 （或在冻结前从其他位置注册，例如 ModContentPackBuilder 的 ModEpoch* 辅助方法），这样可以运行应用时校验（与原版冲突会在应用时抛出）。 执行顺序与调用顺序一致；同一模型后续的 RequireEpoch 会覆盖较早的绑定。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.TimelineColumnBuilder`1.RegisterStory
member.summary: Registers for vanilla story discovery (call once at the end of the column). 为原版故事发现注册 （在列末尾调用一次）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.EpochSlotBuilder`1
member.summary: Per-epoch unlock hooks for the callback passed to .Epoch<TEpoch>(...). 传递给 .Epoch<TEpoch>(...) 的回调所用的逐纪元解锁钩子。

remarks.para: You can call these methods multiple times inside one epoch slot; they run in order. A later RequireEpoch for the same model overwrites the earlier epoch binding.
Anything registered through is gated by / . Integrations include , , , , , and . / 、、 、、

list.item: Cards · gate an entire pool behind this epoch: RequireAllCardsInPool<TCardPool>() (only ; does not register ). ）。
Cards · explicit list + pack-declared unlock UI: Cards(types); whole pool into registry: CardsFromPool<TCardPool>(). CardsFromPool<TCardPool>()。
Relics · explicit or pool + registry: Relics(types), RelicsFromPool<TRelicPool>().

Potions · explicit types: Potions(types). For timeline potion presentation, subclass for your and implement PotionTypes; keep those CLR types aligned with Potions / RequireEpoch (this method already applies RequireEpoch).

remarks.para: 可以在一个纪元槽位内多次调用这些方法；它们会按顺序运行。后续针对同一模型的 RequireEpoch 会覆盖较早的纪元绑定。
凡是通过 注册的内容，都会受到 / 门控。 集成点包括 、、 、、 ， 以及 。 / 、、 、、

list.item: 卡牌 · 将整个池门控在此纪元之后：RequireAllCardsInPool<TCardPool>()（仅注册 ；不会注册 ）。 ）。
卡牌 · 显式列表 + 包声明的解锁 UI：Cards(types)；整个池进入注册表： CardsFromPool<TCardPool>()。 CardsFromPool<TCardPool>()。
遗物 · 显式或池 + 注册表：Relics(types)、RelicsFromPool<TRelicPool>()。
药水 · 整个池：RequireAllPotionsInPool<TPotionPool>()（仅 RequireEpoch；不注册 ）。 ）。
药水 · 显式类型：Potions(types)。如需时间线药水表现，请为你的 派生 并实现 PotionTypes； 保持这些 CLR 类型与 Potions / RequireEpoch 对齐（此方法已经应用 RequireEpoch）。

member.summary: Card pool base that can enumerate legacy CLR card types, expose optional pool frame material overrides, and map energy icon paths for UI patches. 卡牌池基类：可枚举旧式 CLR 卡牌类型，公开可选的池边框材质覆盖， 并为 UI 补丁映射能量图标路径。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Content.TypeListCardPoolModel.CardTypes
member.summary: Legacy hook: enumerating card types on the pool class. Prefer registering each card through ModContentRegistry.RegisterCard<TPool, TCard>(), CreateContentPack.Card<TPool, TCard>(), or a manifest CardRegistrationEntry so ModHelper.AddModelToPool injects them without duplicating the same instances when this property also lists those types. Defaults to an empty sequence. 旧式钩子：枚举池类上的卡牌类型。建议改为通过以下方式逐张注册卡牌： ModContentRegistry.RegisterCard<TPool, TCard>()、CreateContentPack.Card<TPool, TCard>()， 或 manifest CardRegistrationEntry，让 ModHelper.AddModelToPool 注入它们，避免 当此属性也列出这些类型时重复生成同一批 实例。 默认为空序列。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Godot.RitsuGodotNodeFactory`1.ClearSubtreeOwnersForReparent(Godot.Node)
member.summary: Packed-scene children often still reference the old root as after RemoveChild. Godot warns and can break unique-name resolution if reparenting under a new root with the same scene name without clearing first (matches Godot log: inconsistent owner). packed scene 子节点在 RemoveChild 后通常仍以旧根节点作为 。 如果在未先清理的情况下重挂到具有相同场景名称的新根节点下，Godot 会警告并可能破坏唯一名称解析 （匹配 Godot 日志：所有者不一致）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.CueFrameSequencePlayer
member.summary: Internal driver that swaps a through a .

remarks.para: Emits when a non-looping sequence reaches the last frame, and when short-circuits into a one-frame-non-loop state (i.e. the sequence has already reached its terminal frame during start). The signal is consumed by CueAnimationBackend so can advance .
当非循环序列到达最后一帧时，发出 ； 当 短路进入单帧非循环状态（即序列 在启动期间已到达终止帧）时也会发出。该信号由 CueAnimationBackend 消费，使 可以推进 。

member.summary: Raised when the sequence completes (non-loop) or is an already-terminal single frame. Not raised for looping sequences. 当序列完成（非循环）或已是终止单帧时触发。 循环序列不会触发。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.StateMachine.Backends.CompositeAnimationBackend
member.summary: dispatcher that selects the first child backend reporting for a given id and routes / to it. 调度器：选择第一个报告指定 id 存在 的子后端，并将 / 路由给它。

remarks.para: Priority follows insertion order. Typical wiring (cue frame sequences and static textures first, then Spine, then Godot animation player, then animated sprite) is produced by .

Only one child is active at a time. Switching to a different backend during raises for the previously active id and s the outgoing backend so it does not continue playing alongside the newly activated one. across backends is deferred until the current backend reports , at which point the stashed (backend, id, loop) triple is activated.
优先级遵循插入顺序。典型接线（先是 cue 帧序列和静态纹理， 然后是 Spine、Godot animation player、animated sprite）由 生成。
同一时间只有一个子项为 active。在 期间切换到不同后端时， 会为先前活动的 id 触发 ，并对即将离开的后端调用 ，使其不会继续与新激活的后端 同时播放。跨后端的 会延迟到当前后端报告 后再执行，此时会激活暂存的 (backend, id, loop) 三元组。

remarks.para: Animation ids map to cue keys in (preferred) or (fallback static texture). Frame sequences are played through ; its Finished signal is converted to .
Non-looping static cues raise on the next idle frame so the state machine can advance without re-entering the caller synchronously.
动画 id 映射到 中的 cue 键（优先）或 （回退静态纹理）。帧序列通过 播放；其 Finished 信号会转换为 。
非循环静态 cue 会在下一次 idle 帧触发 ，使状态机 可以继续推进，而不会同步重入调用方。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.StateMachine.Backends.FormSwitchingAnimationBackend
member.summary: multiplexer that keeps one backend active at a time and allows runtime form switching (for example, swapping between multiple child visuals under one persistent root). 复用器：同一时间只保持一个后端活动，并允许运行时 形态切换（例如在一个持久的 根节点下切换多个子视觉）。

remarks.para: This backend is intended for the "single visuals root, switch child form" pattern: each form gets its own child backend (Spine, animated sprite, animation player, ...), and swaps the active backend without rebuilding the creature node.

If replayCurrent is , switching replays the current logical animation id on the newly selected form when possible; otherwise callers typically follow with an explicit trigger (for example SetTrigger("Idle")).
此后端用于“单一视觉根节点、切换子形态”模式：每个形态都有自己的 子后端（Spine、animated sprite、animation player 等），并由 在不重建生物节点的情况下切换活动后端。
如果 replayCurrent 为 ，切换时会在可能的情况下于新选中的形态上重放当前逻辑 动画 id；否则调用方通常会接着显式触发 一次触发器（例如 SetTrigger("Idle")）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.StateMachine.Backends.SpineAnimationBackend.Stop
member.remarks: Spine exposes no clean "stop track" API through the MegaSpine bindings; this backend pauses playback by setting the animation state time scale to 0. The character will freeze on its current pose until is called again (which restores the time scale). This keeps / silent as required by . Spine 没有通过 MegaSpine 绑定暴露干净的“停止轨道”API；此后端通过将动画状态时间缩放设为 0 来暂停播放。角色会冻结在当前姿势， 直到再次调用 （这会恢复时间缩放）。这样会按要求保持 / 静默，即 的要求。

member.summary: Uniform driver surface required by so the same state graph can run on Spine (MegaSprite), Godot AnimationPlayer, AnimatedSprite2D, or cue-frame-sequence playback (see ). 所需的统一驱动器表面，使同一状态图可以运行在 Spine（MegaSprite）、Godot AnimationPlayer、AnimatedSprite2D 或 cue 帧序列 播放上（见 ）。

remarks.para: Implementations raise , , and whenever the underlying system reports the corresponding events so the state machine can advance .
is only meaningful for backends with true queue semantics (Spine); other backends may forward it to or defer until fires.

member.summary: Queues after the currently active animation. Non-queue backends may treat this as a deferred triggered on the next . 在当前活动动画之后排队 。非队列后端可以把它视为在下一次 触发时执行的延迟 。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.StateMachine.IAnimationBackend.Stop
member.summary: Stops any active playback silently (does not raise / ) and clears any pending queued animation. Intended for callers that need to relinquish the backend — typically during cross-backend transitions, so the previously active backend does not continue visibly playing alongside the newly activated one. 静默停止任何活动播放（不触发 / ）， 并清除任何待处理的排队动画。用于需要释放后端的调用方， 通常是 在跨后端转换期间使用，避免先前活动的后端继续与新激活的后端 同时可见地播放。
member.remarks: Default implementation is a no-op; backends that drive a visible node should override to halt playback and suppress any lifecycle events that the underlying engine may fire as a consequence of the stop. 默认实现为空操作；驱动可见节点的后端应重写它以停止 播放，并抑制底层引擎可能因停止而触发的任何生命周期事件， 作为停止操作的后果。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Scaffolding.Visuals.StateMachine.ModAnimStateMachines
member.summary: Top-level convenience factories for animation state machines. Mirrors the semantics of baselib's CustomCharacterModel.SetupAnimationState but usable against any (Spine, Godot animation player / animated sprite, cue frame sequences). 动画状态机的顶层便捷工厂。语义对应 baselib 的 CustomCharacterModel.SetupAnimationState，但可用于任何 （Spine、Godot animation player / animated sprite、cue 帧序列）。

remarks.para: produces a vanilla so callers can return it directly from CharacterModel.GenerateAnimator; this is the closest drop-in replacement for the baselib helper.
produces a backend-agnostic for non-Spine visuals rooted at a (cue frame sequences, Godot animation player, animated sprite).
Terminal states (Dead) leave / AnimState.NextState unset so completion does not auto-return to idle, matching the vanilla behaviour.
会生成原版 ，调用方可以直接从 CharacterModel.GenerateAnimator 返回它；这是最接近 baselib helper 的 直接替代方案。
会为以 为根的非 Spine 视觉生成 与后端无关的 （cue 帧序列、Godot animation player、 animated sprite）。
终止状态（Dead）会让 / AnimState.NextState 保持未设置，因此完成后不会自动回到 idle，与原版行为一致。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Screens.ModScreenService
member.summary: Lightweight mod-facing façade around for opening and closing custom s without depending on any specific ritsulib subsystem (card piles, top-bar buttons, combat commands, …). This is the single public API any mod code should use when it wants to mount a screen as a full-page overlay. 围绕 的轻量 mod 侧外观，用于打开和关闭 自定义 ，无需依赖任何特定 ritsulib 子系统 （卡牌牌堆、顶部栏按钮、战斗命令等）。mod 代码想将屏幕挂载为整页覆盖层时， 应使用这个唯一的公共 API。

remarks.para: The capstone container is a scene-owned singleton; during menus / between runs it may not yet exist. The helpers here therefore silently no-op when is null so callers do not need to guard every invocation.

When a capstone screen is already showing, closes it first so the new screen can take the stage — matching the behaviour users expect when clicking "view"-style top-bar buttons that toggle or swap screens.
capstone 容器是由场景拥有的单例；在菜单中或两次跑局之间，它可能 尚未存在。因此这里的 helper 会在 为 null 时静默无操作，调用方无需为每次调用都加保护。
当已有 capstone 屏幕正在显示时， 会先关闭它，让新的 屏幕接管舞台；这符合用户点击用于切换或替换屏幕的“view”式 顶部栏按钮时的预期行为。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Screens.ModScreenService.CurrentCapstoneScreen

member.summary: Mounts inside . If a different capstone is already open, it is closed first; if the same instance is already mounted this is a no-op. 将 挂载到 内。如果已有另一个 capstone 打开，会先将其关闭；如果同一实例已经挂载，则 不执行任何操作。
member.param: Screen to mount (must also be a Godot ). 要挂载的屏幕（也必须是 Godot ）。
member.returns: True when the screen was mounted; false when no container is available. 屏幕已挂载时为 true；没有可用容器时为 false。

Serialized ordinal of the run game mode. 跑局游戏模式的序列化序号。
Ascension level for the run. 跑局的进阶等级。
Local player net id for this client (0 when unavailable). 此客户端的本地玩家 net id（不可用时为 0）。
RNG string seed identifying the run's random stream. 标识跑局随机流的 RNG 字符串种子。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RunSidecar.ModRunSidecarSession
member.summary: Coordinates run sidecar cache epochs and disk cleanup aligned with vanilla run and save lifecycle. Sidecar files are client-local and never mutate vanilla network payloads. 协调跑局 sidecar 缓存纪元和磁盘清理，使其与原版跑局和存档生命周期对齐。sidecar 文件仅存在于客户端本地，绝不会修改原版 网络载荷。

item.description: : delete the ended run’s sidecar folder, then bump epoch (covers ShouldSave == false where vanilla may keep the run save file).
/ : sidecar folder is removed in a Harmony prefix while the save file still exists (main-menu abandon, normal run end after save deletion, etc.); see .
: bump epoch. : delete the entire run_sidecar subtree for that profile.
：删除已结束跑局的 sidecar 文件夹，然后提升纪元（覆盖 原版可能保留跑局存档文件的 ShouldSave == false 情况）。
/ ： 在存档文件仍存在时，于 Harmony prefix 中移除 sidecar 文件夹（主菜单 放弃、存档删除后的正常跑局结束等）；见
：提升纪元。：删除该档案的 整个 run_sidecar 子树。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RunSidecar.ModRunSidecarSession.RunEpoch
member.summary: Incremented whenever the active profile or run instance changes; bindings use it to drop stale caches. 每当活动档案或跑局实例变化时递增；binding 用它丢弃过期缓存。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RunSidecar.ModRunSidecarStore
member.summary: Reads and writes per-mod run sidecar JSON under the framework mod’s profile-scoped storage tree (see base paths for and ; Godot user://, resolve with ). Client-local only; not part of vanilla save sync. 在框架 mod 按档案限定的存储树下读写每个 mod 的跑局 sidecar JSON（参见 中 和 的基础路径；Godot user://，用 解析）。仅限客户端本地；不属于原版存档同步。

remarks.para: Layout under the framework profile base (): {ProfileBase}/{RunSidecarSegment}/{fingerprintStem}/{sanitizedModId}.json. RunSidecarSegment is run_sidecar/v1; fingerprintStem is the lowercase hex SHA-256 from (one folder per run). Each consumer mod owns one JSON file in that folder; the folder is removed when the run ends or when vanilla deletes the current run save file (see ). Writes (see ModRunSidecarSession). Writes use atomic replace via ; if a write fails before any durable *.json exists, the empty run folder is removed best-effort.

框架档案基础目录（）下的布局： RunSidecarSegment 为 run_sidecar/v1；fingerprintStem 是来自 的小写十六进制 SHA-256（每个跑局一个文件夹）。每个消费方 mod 在 该文件夹中拥有一个 JSON 文件；跑局结束或原版删除当前跑局存档文件时会移除该文件夹 （见 ）。写入 （见 ModRunSidecarSession）。写入 通过 使用原子替换； 如果在任何持久 *.json 存在之前写入失败，会尽力移除空跑局文件夹。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RunSidecar.ModRunSidecarStore.TryGetRunSidecarPackDirectoryUserPath(System.String@)
member.summary: When a run is in progress, sets to the per-run sidecar folder (…/run_sidecar/v1/{fingerprintStem}/) so callers can zip or back up every mod file for that run in one step. That directory is deleted when the run ends; copy it first if you need to keep it. 当有进行中的跑局时，将 设置为该跑局的 sidecar 文件夹（…/run_sidecar/v1/{fingerprintStem}/ ），让调用方可以一步压缩或备份该跑局的每个 mod 文件。该目录会在跑局结束时删除；如果需要保留，请先复制。
member.param: Godot user:// path ending at the run directory, or empty when false. 以跑局目录结尾的 Godot user:// 路径；返回 false 时为空。
member.returns: False when no active run fingerprint is available. 没有可用的活动跑局指纹时为 false。

member.summary: Attempts to read the sidecar for for the active run. 尝试读取活动跑局中 的 sidecar。
member.typeparam: Settings DTO type; must deserialize from JSON with a parameterless constructor. 设置 DTO 类型；必须能通过无参构造函数从 JSON 反序列化。

On success, the deserialized settings; otherwise a new instance or default. 成功时为反序列化后的设置；否则为新实例或默认值。
member.returns: Status describing why read succeeded or failed.

member.summary: Legacy slider row: Godot still uses values, but comparisons and binding I/O stay in space to match obsolete AddSlider(..., IModSettingsValueBinding<float>, ...) mods without double bridges. 旧版 滑块行：Godot 仍使用 值， 但比较和 binding I/O 保持在 空间，以匹配不带 double 桥接的过时 AddSlider(..., IModSettingsValueBinding<float>, ...) mod。

member.param: The starting value shown by the slider. 滑块显示的起始值。
The minimum allowed value. 允许的最小值。

member.summary: Creates a color editor with picker options. 创建带选择器选项的颜色编辑器。
member.param: The initial color string (hex, HTML, or BaseLib [r,g,b,a]), or null/empty. 指定 initial color string (hex, HTML, or BaseLib [r,g,b,a]), or null/empty。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiActionHost
member.summary: Minimal host exposed when registering actions with (refresh and dirty marking). 使用 注册动作时公开的最小 host（刷新和脏标记）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiActionHost.RequestRefresh
member.summary: Requests a deferred UI rebuild (e.g. after list mutation). 请求延迟 UI 重建（例如列表变更后）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiActionHost.MarkDirty(STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsBinding)
member.summary: Marks dirty so persistence runs on the next flush. 将 标记为脏，使持久化在下一次 flush 时运行。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiActionHost.RequestRefreshAfterDataModelBatchChange
member.summary: Schedules the next deferred refresh as a full binding pass for the current page: every RegisterRefresh callback on that page runs once, without requiring per binding. Use after batch-mutating many fields or a shared backing object. Persisted keys still need on each binding you changed so runs. 将下一次延迟刷新安排为当前页面的完整 binding 遍历：该页面上的每个 RegisterRefresh 回调都会运行一次，不需要对每个 binding 调用 。 在批量变更多个字段或共享后备对象后使用。持久化键仍需要 在你更改的每个 binding 上调用 ，以便 运行。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiContext.LegacyCodeTagRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<c>(.*?)</c>
Options:
RegexOptions.Singleline
Explanation:
○ Match the string "<c>".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Match the string "</c>".

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiContext.RegisterRefresh(System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a callback invoked on the next UI refresh. Same as calling with a full-pass spec (legacy behavior for extensions compiled against older RitsuLib). 注册在下一次 UI 刷新时调用的回调。等同于使用完整遍历 spec 调用 （为针对旧版 RitsuLib 编译的扩展保留的旧行为）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiContext.RegisterRefresh(System.Action,STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiRefreshSpec)
member.summary: Registers a callback invoked on the next UI refresh when its matches the bindings that were marked dirty since the last flush. 注册一个回调；当其 与上次 flush 后被标记为脏的 binding 匹配时，在下一次 UI 刷新时调用。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiContext.RegisterDynamicVisibility(Godot.Control,System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Re-evaluates Godot Control.Visible on each debounced refresh (sidebar targets that are not part of the main content refresh graph). 在每次防抖刷新时重新评估 Godot Control.Visible（用于不属于主内容刷新图的侧边栏目标）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiRefreshPropagation
member.summary: When is called on this binding, these bindings are also marked dirty so selective refresh specs and autosave see the same invalidation (e.g. projected field → list root, decorator → inner). 当对此 binding 调用 时，这些 binding 也会 被标记为脏，使选择性刷新规范和自动保存看到相同的失效（例如投影字段 → 列表 根、装饰器 → 内部）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiRefreshEquivalence
member.summary: Bindings that participate in UI refresh invalidation as a group (e.g. decorator + inner store). 作为一组参与 UI 刷新失效的 binding（例如装饰器 + 内部存储）。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsUiRefreshEquivalence.UiRefreshAlsoTreatAsDirty
member.summary: Other binding instances that should count as the same target for selective refresh (typically the inner binding when wraps an in-memory binding). 在选择性刷新中应视为同一目标的其他 binding 实例（通常是内部 binding，当 包装内存 binding 时）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiRefreshSpec
member.summary: Declares when a registered settings UI refresh callback should run relative to bindings that were marked dirty since the last flush. 声明已注册的设置 UI 刷新回调应何时运行，依据是上次 flush 后被标记为 脏的 binding。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiRefreshSpec.#ctor(STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsRefreshRegistrationKind,System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray{STS2RitsuLib.Settings.IModSettingsBinding})
member.summary: Declares when a registered settings UI refresh callback should run relative to bindings that were marked dirty since the last flush. 声明已注册的设置 UI 刷新回调应何时运行，依据是上次 flush 后被标记为 脏的 binding。

member.summary: Gets the line theme used by standard settings rows. 获取标准设置行使用的行主题。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.KreonRegular
member.summary: Gets the regular Kreon font used by settings text. 获取设置文本使用的常规 Kreon 字体。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.KreonBold
member.summary: Gets the bold Kreon font used by emphasized settings labels and buttons. 获取强调设置标签和按钮使用的粗体 Kreon 字体。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.KreonButton
member.summary: Gets the button-focused Kreon font variant used by standard settings buttons. 获取标准设置按钮使用的按钮焦点 Kreon 字体变体。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.SelectionReticleScene
member.summary: Gets the shared selection reticle scene used by interactive settings controls. 获取交互式设置控件使用的共享选择光标场景。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.SettingsButtonTexture
member.summary: Gets the standard textured button background used by settings action buttons. 获取设置动作按钮使用的标准纹理按钮背景。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.CreateToneMaterial(STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsButtonTone)
member.summary: Creates a shader material tinted for the requested button tone. 创建按请求的按钮色调着色的着色器材质。
member.param: The semantic tone to apply. 指定 semantic tone to apply。
member.returns: A shader material configured for the requested tone. 为请求的色调配置的着色器材质。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsUiResources.GetToneOutlineColor(STS2RitsuLib.Settings.ModSettingsButtonTone)
member.summary: Gets the outline color associated with the requested button tone. 获取与请求的按钮色调关联的轮廓颜色。
member.param: The semantic tone to resolve. 指定 semantic tone to resolve。
member.returns: The outline color for the requested tone. 请求色调对应的轮廓颜色。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu
member.summary: Full-screen mod settings browser: sidebar (mods, pages, sections) and content pane. 全屏 mod 设置浏览器：侧边栏（mod、页面、section）和内容窗格。

member.name: F:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu.AutosaveDelaySeconds
member.summary: Deferred interval after the last binding write. 最后一次 binding 写入后的延迟 间隔。

member.name: F:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu.RefreshDebounceSeconds
member.summary: Debounced mirror paragraph / static refresh. Must be greater than so the first flush sees persisted and callback Save() effects without an extra refresh pass. 防抖的镜像段落 / 静态刷新。必须大于 ，使第一次 flush 能看到持久化和回调 Save() 效果，而不需要额外刷新遍历。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu.#ctor
member.summary: Builds layout (header, sidebar, scrollable content) and wires initial structure. 构建布局（标题、侧边栏、可滚动内容）并连接初始结构。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu.SelectMod(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Selects a mod in the sidebar, optionally opening , and rebuilds the UI. 在侧边栏中选择一个 mod，可选打开 ，并重建 UI。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Settings.RitsuModSettingsSubmenu.NavigateToPage(System.String)

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Timeline.ModEpochGatedContentRegistry
member.summary: Maps epoch ids to CLR types gated by that epoch (cards and/or relics only — not potions), populated from pack flow such as slot Cards/Relics/RelicsFromPool/ CardsFromPool. Potions use RequireAllPotionsInPool / Potions on EpochSlotBuilder<TEpoch> (RequireEpoch only). Used by pack-declared unlock epoch templates and stays in sync with . 将 epoch id 映射到受该纪元门控的 CLR 类型（仅卡牌和/或遗物，不包括药水），由 pack 流程填充，例如 槽位 Cards/Relics/RelicsFromPool/CardsFromPool。 药水使用 EpochSlotBuilder<TEpoch> 上的 RequireAllPotionsInPool / Potions（仅 RequireEpoch）。 供 pack 声明的解锁纪元模板使用，并与 保持同步。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Timeline.Patches.NTimelineScreenAddEpochSlotsMergeModTemplatesPatch
member.summary: Vanilla only passes epochs that already exist in into . Mod story lines are not inserted into the save until gameplay or expansion runs , so mod columns would stay missing while the underlying unlock flow stays correct. Cold open (isAnimated: false) merges only after vanilla Neow's primary expansion has started (see ). Animated expansion merges only when just queued that batch (pending flag from ). 原版 只会把纪元 中已经存在于 的内容传给 在游戏流程或扩展运行 之前，mod 故事线不会插入存档，因此 mod 列会保持缺失，而 底层解锁流程仍然正确。冷打开（isAnimated: false）只会在原版 Neow 的 主扩展开始后合并（见 主扩展开始后（见 ModTimelineNeowCoExpansion.HasVanillaNeowTimelineExpansionStarted ）。 动画扩展只会在 刚刚将该批次入队时合并（pending 标志来自 ）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Timeline.Patches.NTimelineScreenAddEpochSlotsMergeModTemplatesPatch.Prefix(System.Collections.Generic.List{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Timeline.EpochSlotData},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Cold: merge after Neow primary expansion has touched save. Animated: merge only with pending from Neow plus matching slot batch. 冷打开：在 Neow 主扩展触及存档后合并。动画：仅在来自 Neow 的 pending 状态加上匹配槽批次时合并。

member.summary: Before the timeline queues expansion slots, align with EpochModel._epochTypeDictionary. Otherwise FilterAndSortEpochs may strip mod expansion ids (IsValid false) immediately after , so the live expansion UI breaks while a cold reload still shows slots once the cache matches the dictionary. 在 timeline 将扩展槽入队前，将 与 EpochModel._epochTypeDictionary 对齐。否则 FilterAndSortEpochs 可能会在 后立即剔除 mod 扩展 id（IsValid false），导致实时扩展 UI 损坏，而冷 重载在缓存与字典匹配后仍会显示槽。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarButtonRegistry
member.summary: Per-mod registration surface for extra top-bar buttons. Mirrors the ergonomics of ModCardPileRegistry (fluent For(modId).RegisterOwned(localStem, spec)), but is fully decoupled from the card-pile subsystem — the button only knows how to show an icon, expose a hover-tip and run a click callback. 每个 mod 的额外顶部栏按钮注册入口。对应 ModCardPileRegistry 的易用性（流式 For(modId).RegisterOwned(localStem, spec)），但 与牌堆子系统完全解耦；按钮只负责显示图标、 暴露悬停提示并运行点击回调。

remarks.para: Ids follow the ritsulib MODID_CATEGORY_TYPENAME public-entry convention via (middle segment fixed to TOPBARBUTTON). The registered id is also the stem for static_hover_tips title / description keys ({id}.title / {id}.description).

Registrations do not need to be frozen alongside ModelDb: top-bar buttons are mounted when the top bar node is ready, which happens after model init. The registry therefore simply de-duplicates by id (same mod re-registering the same stem returns the existing definition).
Id 通过 遵循 ritsulib MODID_CATEGORY_TYPENAME 公开条目约定 （中间段固定为 TOPBARBUTTON）。注册的 id 也是 static_hover_tips 标题/描述键（{id}.title / {id}.description）的 stem。
注册无需与 ModelDb 一起冻结：顶部栏按钮会在顶部栏节点 ready 时挂载， 这发生在模型初始化之后。因此注册表 只按 id 去重（同一 mod 以同一 stem 重新注册会返回现有 定义）。

member.summary: Declarative spec for a mod-owned top-bar button. Mirrors ModCardPileSpec's structure but is fully decoupled from card piles — the only contract is "show a button next to the vanilla deck button, hover-tip via static_hover_tips, click runs a callback". mod 拥有的顶部栏按钮的声明式 spec。结构对应 ModCardPileSpec，但 与牌堆完全解耦；唯一契约是“在原版牌组 按钮旁显示一个按钮，通过 static_hover_tips 提供悬停提示，点击时运行回调”。

Evaluated on to keep the visibility state in sync with combat/run state changes. 可选谓词，用于决定按钮对当前玩家是否可见。当 为 null 时，按钮始终可见（顶部栏存在后）。在 上求值，以让可见性状态与战斗/跑局状态 变化保持同步。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarButtonSpec.IsOpenWhen
member.summary: Optional predicate used by the button to decide when it should render in its "screen open" rocking state (mirroring vanilla NTopBarDeckButton / NTopBarMapButton). Typical usage is ctx => ModScreenService.CurrentCapstoneScreen is MyScreen. When null the button never enters the open state — pick this for one-shot "fire and forget" click handlers. 可选谓词，供按钮判断何时应渲染为“屏幕打开” 摇动状态（对应原版 NTopBarDeckButton / NTopBarMapButton）。典型 用法为 ctx => ModScreenService.CurrentCapstoneScreen is MyScreen。为 null 时按钮永远不会 进入打开状态；一次性“触发后即忘”的点击处理器应选择此项。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarButtonSpec.CountProvider
member.summary: Optional provider used to populate the count badge under the button's icon. Called on — keep it cheap. When null, the count label is hidden entirely, which is the right choice for fire-and-forget action buttons (menus, toggles). When set, the button reuses the vanilla card-pile "number jumped up" bump animation so the feedback feels identical to the player's deck / draw / discard counts. 可选提供器，用于填充按钮图标下方的计数徽章。在 上调用，应保持轻量。为 null 时，计数标签会被 完全隐藏，这适合 fire-and-forget 动作按钮（菜单、切换）。 设置后，按钮会复用原版牌堆“数字跳起”的弹性动画，使 反馈与玩家的牌组 / 抽牌堆 / 弃牌堆计数一致。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarButtonLocConstants
member.summary: Shared constants for the top-bar-button localization convention. 顶部栏按钮本地化约定的共享常量。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarLayout
member.summary: Single source of truth for where mod top-bar buttons land relative to the vanilla %Deck button. Both pile-backed buttons and action-backed buttons funnel through this helper so the two systems cannot disagree about slot ordering / direction — addressing the user feedback that having two independent layout algorithms was a "meaningless split". mod 顶部栏按钮相对于原版 %Deck 按钮落位位置的单一事实来源。牌堆支持的 按钮和 动作支持的 按钮都会经过此辅助类，使 两个系统不会在槽顺序 / 方向上产生分歧；这是对用户 反馈“有两个独立布局算法是无意义拆分”的回应。

remarks.para:
The actual layout container for the right-side cluster is RootSceneContainer/Run/GlobalUi/TopBar/RightAlignedStuff — and crucially it is an (separation=0, alignment=end) that auto-lays out its children left-to-right in registration order. The canonical vanilla child sequence is [SaveIndicator][Padding][TimerContainer][Map][DeckContainer][PauseButton] — so to drop a mod button "just to the left of the deck" we need two things:
the button must be parented under this HBoxContainer, and
its child index must be immediately before DeckContainer's index.
Because the container is auto-laid-out, we do not set ourselves — doing so would fight the HBoxContainer and produce the "button appears nowhere visible" bug from the previous iteration.

Slot ordering: mod buttons are inserted in registration order, each one claiming the slot immediately before the deck container / deck button. The newest registration ends up closest to the deck; the earliest registration ends up furthest left. This keeps every mod button contiguous with the vanilla deck icon and avoids splitting them into "pile row" / "action row".

右侧集群的实际布局容器是 RootSceneContainer/Run/GlobalUi/TopBar/RightAlignedStuff；关键是它是 （separation=0、alignment=end），会 按注册顺序从左到右自动布局子节点。规范的原版 子节点顺序是 [SaveIndicator][Padding][TimerContainer][Map][DeckContainer][PauseButton]； 因此，要把 mod 按钮放到“牌组左侧紧邻位置”，需要两点：
按钮必须挂到此 HBoxContainer 下，且
其子索引必须紧邻 DeckContainer 索引之前。
因为容器会自动布局，我们不会自行设置 ；这样做会与 HBoxContainer 冲突，并 产生上一轮中“按钮没有出现在可见位置”的 bug。
槽顺序：mod 按钮按注册顺序插入，每个按钮占用 牌组容器/牌组按钮正前方的槽。最新 注册最终最接近牌组；最早注册最终最靠 左。这让每个 mod 按钮都与原版牌组图标连续，并避免 拆成“牌堆行”/“动作行”。 拆成“牌堆行”/“动作行”。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarLayout.GetRightAlignedContainer(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.CommonUi.NTopBar)
member.summary: Returns the real right-side layout container (RightAlignedStuff, an ) — the parent of either %Deck directly or the DeckContainer that wraps it. Returns null when the top bar hasn't resolved yet. 返回真实的右侧布局容器（RightAlignedStuff，一个 ），它是 %Deck 的直接父节点，或是包裹它的 DeckContainer 的父节点。当顶部栏尚未解析 时返回 null。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarLayout.GetDeckSlotAnchor(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.CommonUi.NTopBar)
member.summary: Returns the direct child of the right-aligned container that ultimately contains %Deck — often the DeckContainer that wraps the deck button. We insert mod buttons immediately before this node so they land "just to the left of the deck", matching the existing vanilla placement of Map / DeckContainer / PauseButton. of Map / DeckContainer / PauseButton. 返回右对齐容器的直接子节点，该节点最终包含 %Deck；通常是包裹牌组按钮的 DeckContainer 。 我们会把 mod 按钮插到此节点之前， 让它们落在“牌组左侧紧邻位置”，匹配现有原版 Map / DeckContainer / PauseButton 的放置方式。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.ModTopBarLayout.Place(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.CommonUi.NTopBar,STS2RitsuLib.CardPiles.Nodes.NModCardPileButton,Godot.Vector2)
member.summary: Attaches to the right-aligned container (re-parenting when necessary) and orders it so it sits immediately to the left of the deck-slot anchor. The button is sized to match one vanilla top-bar slot (80×80 minimum) and left at — the enclosing drives the actual screen position. Returns true on success, false when the top bar isn't ready yet (caller should retry). 将 附加到右对齐容器（必要时重新挂父）， 并排序，使其立即位于牌组槽锚点的左侧。 按钮会调整为匹配一个原版顶部栏槽 （80×80 最小值），并将 保持不变； 实际屏幕位置由外层 驱动。 实际屏幕位置由外层 HBoxContainer 驱动。 成功时返回 true；顶部栏尚未就绪时返回 false（调用方应重试）。

member.summary: Attaches to the right-aligned container and places it immediately after the deck slot anchor (typically between deck and pause). 将 附加到右对齐容器，并将其立即放在 牌组槽锚点之后（通常位于牌组和暂停之间）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.TopBar.Patches.ModTopBarActionButtonReadyPatch
member.summary: Mounts every registered onto after its vanilla _Ready has populated %Deck. Buttons are instances in "action mode" — that is, they look and animate exactly like pile-backed top-bar buttons, but dispatch clicks through and draw their count label from . The two registries share one placement algorithm (see ) so the player-side cluster next to %Deck never splits into "pile row" vs "action row". 在原版 _Ready 填充 %Deck 后，将每个已注册的 挂载到 。 按钮是“动作模式”的 实例；也就是说，它们外观和动画与牌堆支持的 顶部栏按钮完全相同，但点击会通过 分发，并从 绘制计数标签。两个注册表共享一个放置 算法（见 ），因此 %Deck 旁的玩家侧集群 永远不会拆成“牌堆行”和“动作行”。 永远不会拆成“牌堆行”和“动作行”。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeMerger
member.summary: Deep-merges DTFM token trees while preserving leaf semantics. 深度合并 DTFM 令牌树，同时保留叶节点语义。
member.remarks: Group nodes (objects without $value) are merged recursively; leaf nodes (objects carrying $value) are replaced wholesale. Arrays and scalars are replaced wholesale. 分组节点 (没有的对象 $value) are 递归合并; leaf 节点 (携带的对象 $value) are 整体替换. 数组和标量 are 整体替换。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeMerger.MergeInto(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Merges on top of in-place. New keys are added, overlapping keys recurse for groups and replace for leaves. 将 原地合并到 之上。新键会被添加， 重叠键在分组中递归合并，在叶节点中替换。
member.param: The mutable base dictionary (modified in place). 可变基准字典（原地修改）。
The overlay JSON element (must be an object). 覆盖用 JSON 元素（必须是对象）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeMerger.IsLeafToken(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Determines whether a JSON object is a DTFM leaf token ($value present). 判断 JSON 对象是否为 DTFM 叶令牌（存在 $value）。

member.summary: Cloned representation of a DTFM leaf token after merging. Holds the raw $value as a CLR primitive (string, long, double, bool) and the $type hint. 合并后 DTFM 叶令牌的克隆表示。将原始 $value 保存为 CLR 基元 （string、long、double、bool）以及 $type 提示。
member.param: Raw value (string with optional {ref}, number, or boolean). 原始值 (string 与 可选 {ref}, 数字, or 布尔值)。
Token type hint (e.g. color, dimension, fontFamily). 令牌类型提示（例如 color、dimension、fontFamily）。
Optional human description. 可选的人类可读描述。
Optional $extensions blob (vendor metadata). 可选 $extensions blob（供应商元数据）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeReferenceResolver
member.summary: Resolves W3C Design Tokens {path.to.token} references inside a merged token tree, in place. A reference must denote a single leaf; the resolver replaces it with the leaf's resolved value. 在合并后的令牌树中原地解析 W3C Design Tokens {path.to.token} 引用。 引用必须指向单个叶节点；解析器会将其替换为该叶节点的解析值。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeReferenceResolver.ResolveAll(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Resolves all {ref} references in . Loops produce an exception in and the offending leaf is left with its raw string. 解析 {ref} 引用，范围为 。循环引用会在 中产生异常，出错的叶节点会保留其原始字符串。
member.param: Merged token root. 合并后的令牌根节点。
Diagnostics accumulator. 诊断累加器。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeReferenceResolver.TryFindLeaf(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.LeafToken@)
member.summary: Looks up a leaf token by dotted path (e.g. core.color.amber.500). 按点分隔路径查找叶令牌（例如 core.color.amber.500）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeReferenceResolver.GetSingleReferenceRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s*\\{\\s*([^{}]+?)\\s*\\}\\s*$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '{'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^{}] lazily at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '}'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime
member.summary: Holds the snapshot and the public lifecycle (apply theme, reapply on disk change, listen for changes, register mod tokens). All members are thread-safe. 持有 快照和公共生命周期（应用主题、 在磁盘变更后重新应用、监听变更、注册 mod 令牌）。所有成员都是线程安全的。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.ActiveThemeId
member.summary: Last applied theme id (lowercase). Defaults to default until a successful apply. 最后应用的主题 id (小写). 默认为 default 直到成功应用。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.Current
member.summary: Current theme snapshot. Calling this also lazily builds default if no theme has been applied yet. 当前主题快照. 调用此项也会惰性构建 default if no theme h为 been 应用 尚未。

member.name: E:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.ThemeChanged
member.summary: Fired after the current snapshot has been replaced. 当前快照被替换后触发。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.EnsureBaseline
member.summary: Builds the baseline snapshot if not yet built (uses default). 构建基线快照 if 尚未构建 (使用 default)。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.ApplyThemeId(System.String)
member.summary: Applies the named theme. / blank picks default; if the lookup fails the current snapshot is preserved (or rebuilt as default). 应用指定名称的主题。 / 空白会选择 default；如果查找 失败，则保留当前快照（或重建为默认快照）。
member.param: Target theme id (case-insensitive). 目标主题 id (不区分大小写)。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Ui.Shell.Theme.RitsuShellThemeRuntime.ReapplyActiveTheme(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Re-applies the current , optionally clearing the catalog cache so disk changes are picked up. 重新应用当前 ，并可选择清除目录缓存，使 磁盘变更被拾取。
member.param: When , the on-disk catalog is reloaded. 当为 时，重新加载磁盘目录。

member.param: Mod identifier. Mod 标识符。
DTFM JSON tree (object) merged before chain documents. DTFM JSON tree (对象) 合并后 在链式文档之前。
Optional callback fired after every rebuild. 可选 回调 fired 之后 every rebuild。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Unlocks.ModUnlockMissingRuleWarnings
member.summary: Emits at most one warning per key so mod characters missing unlock-rule registration stay playable without spamming logs every combat or frame. 每个键最多输出一次警告，使缺少解锁规则注册的 mod 角色仍可游玩，同时避免每场战斗或每帧刷日志。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Unlocks.ModUnlockRegistry.SetEpochRequirementsIgnoredForMod(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: When is true, models registered by skip gating at runtime (cards/relics/characters appear as if every epoch were met). Ascension reveal rules tied to that character still consult this bypass via patch integration. 当 为 true 时，由 注册的模型会跳过 运行时的 门控（卡牌 / 遗物 / 角色会表现得像已满足所有纪元 要求）。 与该角色绑定的进阶显示规则仍会通过补丁集成检查此旁路。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Unlocks.ModUnlockRegistry.IsUnlocked(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.AbstractModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Unlocks.UnlockState)
member.summary: Whether passes epoch gating for . Vanilla built from progress only lists epochs in UnlockedEpochs, while sets / until the timeline reveals the slot. Mod unlock rules call ObtainEpoch, so we also treat as satisfying . 。 是否通过 的纪元门控。 从进度构建的原版 只会在 UnlockedEpochs 中列出 纪元， 而 会设置 / ，直到时间线显示该槽位。mod 解锁规则会调用 ObtainEpoch，因此也将 视为满足 。 。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Unlocks.PostRunUnlockContext

member.param: Serializable run being finalized. 正在完成结算的可序列化跑局。
Local player state from the run. 跑局中的本地玩家状态。
True if the run ended in victory. 如果跑局以胜利结束，则为 true。
True if the run was abandoned. 如果跑局被放弃，则为 true。
Total runs recorded in progress at evaluation time. 评估时进度中记录的总跑局数。
Total wins recorded in progress at evaluation time. 评估时进度中记录的总胜利数。
Character played for this run. 本次跑局使用的角色。
Ascension level of the run. 本次跑局的进阶等级。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1
member.summary: Deterministically mints 32-bit integer values for string ids and casts them into the target . Intended for safely extending vanilla enums (such as CardKeyword, CardPile, CardTag, etc.) with mod-defined members without ever colliding with low vanilla enum members: minted values are forced into a reserved high-value band above , leaving the low range untouched for vanilla. 为字符串 id 确定性地铸造 32 位整数值，并将其转换为目标 。用于安全扩展原版枚举（例如 CardKeyword、CardPile、CardTag 等）的 mod 定义成员，且不会与 低位原版枚举成员冲突：铸造值会被强制放入高于 的保留高值区间，低值范围保留给原版。

remarks.para: Values are computed as ReservedFloor + (XxHash32(utf8(id)) mod (int.MaxValue - ReservedFloor + 1)), yielding stable, cross-process, cross-run identical values for the same input id. The hash itself is well-distributed, but collision protection between different mod ids is out of scope per project convention; duplicate-id registration is rejected explicitly.

Only enums whose underlying storage is 32-bit (int or uint) are supported; larger or smaller backings are rejected in the constructor. This matches how the vanilla multiplayer writer treats enums (PacketWriter.WriteEnum passes them through Convert.ToInt32).
值按 ReservedFloor + (XxHash32(utf8(id)) mod (int.MaxValue - ReservedFloor + 1)) 计算， 因此同一输入 id 会得到跨进程、跨跑局稳定相同的值。哈希本身 分布良好，但根据项目约定，不同 mod id 之间的碰撞保护不在范围内； 重复 id 注册会被显式拒绝。
仅支持底层存储为 32 位（int 或 uint）的枚举；更大或 更小的底层类型会在构造函数中被拒绝。这与原版多人写入器处理 枚举的方式一致（PacketWriter.WriteEnum 会通过 Convert.ToInt32 传递它们）。

member.name: F:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.DefaultReservedFloor
member.summary: Default reserved floor. Minted values land in [0x4000_0000, 0x7FFF_FFFF], which is safely above any plausible future vanilla enum growth while remaining positive . 默认保留下界。铸造值落在 [0x4000_0000, 0x7FFF_FFFF]，该范围安全地 高于未来原版枚举可能增长到的值，同时仍保持为正 。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a minter using . 使用 创建铸造器。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a minter whose produced integer values are always >= , so every minted value sits strictly above any low vanilla enum member. 创建一个铸造器，其生成的整数值始终 >= ， 因此每个铸造值都严格位于任何低位原版枚举成员之上。
member.param: Lower bound (inclusive) for minted values. Must be >= 0. Values in [0, reservedFloor) are left for vanilla enum members. 铸造值的下界（含）。必须为 >= 0。[0, reservedFloor) 中的值 保留给原版枚举成员。

member.name: P:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.ReservedFloor
member.summary: Lower bound (inclusive) for all minted values; vanilla enum members below this value never collide. 所有铸造值的下界（含）；低于此值的原版枚举成员永不碰撞。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.Mint(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value for , registering it on first call. Subsequent calls with the same id return the same value; ids are compared case-insensitively. 返回 对应的 值，并在首次 调用时注册它。之后使用同一 id 调用会返回相同值；id 比较不区分大小写。
member.exception: When two distinct ids hash to the same value (registration-time 当 two distinct ids hash to the same TEnum value (注册-time collision detection; callers are expected to pick non-colliding ids). 中文说明：collision detection; callers are expected to pick non-colliding ids).

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.TryGetId(`0,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve the string id that minted . 尝试解析铸造出 的字符串 id。
member.returns: true when was produced by an earlier call. 当 由先前的 调用生成时为 true。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.TryGetValue(System.String,`0@)
member.summary: Returns the value currently bound to without registering a new one. 返回当前绑定到 的 值，不会 注册新值。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.DynamicEnumValueMinter`1.IsDynamic(`0)
member.summary: Whether was minted by this registry (i.e. represents a registered dynamic member rather than a vanilla enum literal). 是否由此注册表铸造（即表示已注册的动态 成员，而不是原版枚举字面值）。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.HarmonyIl.HarmonyVerifiedIl
member.summary: Small, auditable IL helpers for Harmony transpilers. Only patterns that are easy to reason about and match verified game / stub method shapes belong here — not a general instruction matcher. 供 Harmony transpiler 使用的小型、可审计 IL 辅助方法。这里只放易于推理 且匹配已验证游戏 / 存根方法形状的模式；这里不是通用指令匹配器。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.HarmonyIl.HarmonyVerifiedIl.InsertBeforeFirstRet(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction})
member.summary: Inserts immediately before the first in . Suitable for empty or single-return stub methods (e.g. ModInterop shims). 将 插入到 中第一个 之前。 适用于空存根方法或单返回存根方法（例如 ModInterop shim）。

remarks.para: Not supported: methods with no ret, multiple returns, or filter/try regions where the first ret is not the intended injection site.
Prefer writing a dedicated transpiler when you need label preservation or multi-site edits.
不支持：没有 ret、存在多个返回、或包含 filter/try 区域的方法， 其中第一个 ret 不是预期注入位置。
需要保留标签或进行多位置编辑时，优先编写专用 transpiler。

member.summary: Same as but returns false when no ret exists, instead of throwing. 与 相同，但在不存在 ret 时返回 false，而不是抛出异常。

member.summary: Enumerates the current merged translations as key-value pairs. 以键值对形式枚举当前已合并的翻译。
member.remarks: Enumeration uses a snapshot copy to avoid collection-modified exceptions if reload happens during iteration. 枚举会使用快照副本，避免迭代期间重载翻译导致集合被修改异常。

When true, keys are ordered with ordinal ignore case. 为 true 时，按键名以序号忽略大小写排序。

member.summary: Reloads translations for the current resolved language and raises . 重新加载当前解析语言的翻译，并触发 。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.I18N.ResolveCurrentLanguageCode
member.summary: Resolves the current game locale to a normalized language code. 将当前游戏区域语言解析为规范化语言代码。
member.remarks:
Resolution tries (in order):
Godot.TranslationServer.GetLocale()；Godot.TranslationServer.GetLocale()
The returned value is always normalized by and falls back to eng when unknown. 解析会按顺序尝试：
返回值始终由 规范化，并在未知时回退到 eng。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.I18N.NormalizeLanguageCode(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a locale / language input to RitsuLib's stable three-letter-ish codes. 将区域/语言输入规范化为 RitsuLib 稳定使用的近似三字母代码。
member.remarks:
Examples:
Unrecognized values are lower-cased, with - replaced by _. Null or whitespace inputs fall back to eng. 示例：
无法识别的值会转为小写，并将 - 替换为 _。 null 或空白输入会回退到 eng。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils
member.summary: Factory helpers for Godot materials that mirror vanilla game shaders. 用于镜像原版游戏着色器的 Godot 材质工厂辅助方法。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateRgbShaderMaterial(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Builds a ShaderMaterial using the game's HSV shader with the given RGB parameters. 使用游戏的 HSV 着色器和给定 RGB 参数构建 ShaderMaterial。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateHsvShaderMaterial(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Builds a ShaderMaterial using the game's HSV shader with the given parameters. 使用游戏的 HSV 着色器和给定参数构建 ShaderMaterial。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateUnmodulatedHsvShaderMaterial
member.summary: Returns a built from the game's HSV shader configured to preserve the original colors (identity modulation: h=0, s=1, v=1). 返回由游戏 HSV 着色器构建的 ，配置为保留 原始颜色（恒等调制：h=0、s=1、v=1）。
member.remarks: This is useful when you want to override a card frame's FrameMaterial without introducing any additional color modulation, while still using the vanilla shader pipeline. 当你想覆盖卡牌框的 FrameMaterial，但不引入任何额外 颜色调制，同时仍使用原版着色器管线时，这很有用。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateDoomBarShaderMaterial(Godot.GradientTexture1D)
member.summary: Builds a ShaderMaterial using the game's doom health bar shader (doom_bar.gdshader) with the same noise settings as health_bar.tscn and a caller-supplied gradient. 使用游戏的 doom 血条着色器（doom_bar.gdshader）构建 ShaderMaterial，并采用与 health_bar.tscn 相同的噪声设置以及调用方提供的渐变。
member.remarks: Typical use: on custom forecast overlays so they read like the vanilla doom strip (see also CreateVanillaDoomBarGradientTexture). 典型用法：在自定义预测 叠加层上设置 ，使其呈现为原版 doom 条（另见 CreateVanillaDoomBarGradientTexture）。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateVanillaDoomBarGradientTexture
member.summary: Gradient texture matching the vanilla doom bar segment in health_bar.tscn. 与 health_bar.tscn 中原版 doom 条片段匹配的渐变纹理。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.MaterialUtils.CreateVanillaDoomBarNoiseTexture
member.summary: Noise texture matching health_bar.tscn (Perlin, frequency 0.0383). 与 health_bar.tscn 匹配的噪声纹理（Perlin，频率 0.0383）。

member.summary: Extensible storage addressing context carried alongside persistence operations. Extensible 存储 addressing context carried alongside persistence operations.

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.DataLifecycleState
member.summary: High-level state of whether profile-scoped mod data may be accessed safely. 档案作用域 mod 数据是否可安全访问的高层状态。

member.summary: No active profile context is ready for mod persistence yet. 尚无活动档案上下文可用于 mod 持久化。

member.name: F:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.DataLifecycleState.Ready
member.summary: Profile path is initialized and mod data operations are expected to be valid. 档案路径已初始化，mod 数据操作预期有效。

member.name: T:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.ProfileDataReadyEvent
member.summary: Published when profile-scoped mod data becomes readable/writable after initialization or reload. 初始化或重新加载后，当档案作用域 mod 数据变为可读 / 可写时发布。
member.param: Active profile identifier. 活动档案标识符。
Subsystem that triggered the notification. 触发通知的子系统。
True on the first transition to ready. 首次转换为 ready 时为 true。
True when the ready profile id changed from a previous ready state. 当 ready 档案 id 相比上一个 ready 状态发生变化时为 true。

member.summary: Attempt to migrate JSON data to the current version 尝试将 JSON 数据迁移到当前版本。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.Migration.MigrationManager.GetCurrentVersion``1
member.summary: Get the current version for a data type 获取数据类型的当前版本。

member.name: M:STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.Migration.MigrationManager.TryBuildShortestMigrationPath(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.Migration.IMigration},System.Collections.Generic.List{STS2RitsuLib.Utils.Persistence.Migration.IMigration}@)
member.summary: Breadth-first search on version states: from current version , a registered migration applies when the version lies in [FromVersion, ToVersion), advancing the state to ToVersion. Edges whose ToVersion exceeds are skipped so the plan ends at the configured current schema. The returned path uses the minimum number of migration steps; ties are broken by iteration order (registration order, then sort by FromVersion, ToVersion). 对版本状态执行广度优先搜索：从当前版本 开始， 当版本位于 [FromVersion, ToVersion) 时，已注册迁移适用，并将 状态推进到 ToVersion。 会跳过 ToVersion 超过 的边，使计划结束于 配置的当前 schema。返回路径使用最少迁移步骤数；平局时 按迭代顺序打破（注册顺序，然后按 FromVersion、ToVersion 排序）。
